The diff

Changes for version 0.130

    ENHANCEMENTS
        Add MediaMessage result class (Stefan Hornburg/Racke).
    BUG FIXES
        Fix problems reported by new DBIx::Class SanityChecker (Peter Mottram).
        Simplify DBIC/SQLT dependency config to fix travis 5.24 dep problems (Peter Mottram).
        Disregard password for reset token checksum in case it isn't yet defined (Peter Mottram).
        Add YAML to build dependencies for the sake of Schema::Config (Peter Mottram).
    TESTS
        Add coverage testing to Travis configuration file (Stefan Hornburg/Racke).

---
All test OK.
